Transcrição Completa: Day 20 - Creative Follow-up Strategy

 

[00:00] Ladies and gentlemen, day 20, switching up the angles. You feel me? All right, hear me out. You need to hit 100 per day, but you need to creatively follow up.

 

[00:15] So, what I'm going to show you, whatever environment you're in, maybe you're at a desk, maybe you're just sitting at home, maybe you're in a co-working space of some kind. Maybe you have your own office, wherever it is, whatever you're doing, get out your handy dandy phone, put some stuff on your desk like I did, including some notepads, some pens.

 

[00:35] You kind of want some random stuff that's just going to clank around. Uh, you want to be careful with things like laptops, of course. Um, anything that's flat typically works well, like hard drives of some kind. Book bags are going to be like necessary items and just kind of not like clutter your space.

 

[00:52] If you've noticed everything I just said somehow relates to a work environment that should be here anyway, those are the type of things you want. And so what we're going to do, we're going to give you an example. All right, here we go.

 

[01:05] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Creative Follow-up Setup"

 

NÚMEROS: 100 por dia

 

VISUAL: Ambiente de trabalho com notepads, canetas, itens de escritório dispostos estrategicamente, celular em posição para gravar, setup casual mas profissional

 

[01:10] So, you're going to pick up your phone and in real time, if it's just you, you can do this. Also, you can do it typically works with somebody else. If you want to have somebody else hold the phone in this example, you can give the device to somebody and you can tell them, "Hey, hold my phone." just literally walk into the frame like you're just kind of looking and as soon as they point the phone at you, you take action.

 

[01:30] Or once again if you're doing it yourself because in this case I don't have somebody else in real time that I'm going to have hold the phone and come into the frame with me here. So this is what you do, right? You take out your handy dandy phone, open up your camera, you go into it. As you go into it, you guys are going to flip it over to the selfie mode. Keep in mind you got all your stuff around you. And here you go.

 

[01:55] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Script Exemplo #1 - Follow-up com Bob"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Demonstração prática de vídeo follow-up, câmera em modo selfie, ambiente de escritório ao fundo, movimentação natural procurando itens

 

[01:58] Hey, what's going on, Bob? So, listen. I'm here at the desk and I wanted to show you uh I must have misplaced the sticky note. I'm trying to find it right now. Maybe I was wrong. Maybe I'm not. But can you can you let me know if I accidentally reached out to you at the wrong time or maybe there was something on your end?

 

[02:18] I know you're a busy person and you're an executive. And that's exactly why we do the services that we offer is because in real time we offer people like you things in order to save you time and get you results with the time that you don't have.

 

[02:32] So, you know, help me out. Did I misplace the time that we were supposed to speak or when's a good time that we can follow back up? let me know, Bob. Talk soon.

 

[02:42] And you send out that video and as soon as you send it out to good old Bob, he's going to have an opportunity to follow you back up.

 

[02:48] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Script Exemplo #2 - Follow-up de Contrato"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Segunda demonstração de vídeo follow-up, procurando contrato em notebooks e book bag, tom casual e autêntico, linguagem corporal natural

 

[02:50] You can also do this with contracts. Handy dandy pulling out the phone saying, "Hey, uh, Bob, I'm a little confused. I had actually thought I swear I misplaced you, dude. I don't know if I had it digitally or um, yeah, I don't know. I mean, I I was like flipping through my notebooks, dude.

 

[03:08] I sent you that contract and you told me you were going to send it back, but dude, I don't know what happened, man. I didn't get it. Um, I checked my book bag a bunch and uh, yeah, I didn't see it in there. So, I must have misplaced it or maybe I maybe I didn't get it back.

 

[03:24] Uh, I'm going to check my secretary, but just in case, can you do me a favor? Can you check your records to see if you sent over that contract yet? I I like I said, I thought I'd misplaced it and we wanted to take action. We had spoke about the timetable and we just wanted to make sure we were still on track with everything that we had sent over and if there's any questions, um, you know, shoot me a call, let me know. Look forward to chat with you soon. Bye, Bob.

 

[03:50] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Estratégia de Execução"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Conceito visual de "misplace things on purpose", abordagem divertida e humana, contraste entre formal e casual

 

[03:52] Shoot out these kinds of videos to people, guys. Misplace things on purpose, but do it in a way obviously where it looks fun and you're not actually trying to misplace things. So anyway, do this with confidence. Do it with fluency. It works really well. All this stuff is fun.

 

[04:08] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "H2H Philosophy"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Comparação visual: B2B vs B2C vs H2H (Human to Human), ênfase em comunicação humana, quebra de paradigma tradicional de vendas

 

[04:10] If you guys think of any kind of projection onto these kinds of things, like, "Oh, Jeremy, how are these kinds of followup videos going to work?" You're in a communication cycle. It's not B2B. It's not B TO C. It's H2. It's human to human. You're trying to have fun.

 

[04:25] Don't just let these other people think you're going to monger them and try to take money from them in real time. Create a humor within your follow-up process on top of sending them data driven emails about very specific things such as in the last examples in the last few days.

 

[04:40] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Mix de Follow-up Strategy"

 

NÚMEROS: Últimos dias mencionados, Day 21 próximo

 

VISUAL: Estratégia combinada: vídeos criativos + emails data-driven, alternância entre abordagens, uso de props e furniture de home office

 

[04:42] Pepper in videos like this and pepper-in videos like the data driven follow-ups one after the other. A few times like this and a few of the other things we're going to include in these next few days worth of follow-up as far as props, home office furniture, anything that you guys can use.

 

[04:58] Once again, we're going to show you how to use. And I look forward see you on day 21. Go hit your 100. Make a rain.

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

Meta diária: 100 contatos

Dia 20 do programa

Próximo: Day 21

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Creative Follow-up Strategy: Uso de vídeos personalizados em selfie mode

"Misplacing" Technique: Fingir ter perdido sticky notes, contratos ou informações para criar razão de follow-up

H2H Approach: Human to Human ao invés de B2B ou B2C

Mix Strategy: Alternar entre vídeos criativos e emails data-driven

Dual Video Scripts:

Follow-up de agendamento perdido

Follow-up de contrato não recebido

 

ESTRUTURA:

Setup de ambiente: notepads, canetas, hard drives, book bags

Gravação em modo selfie com movimento natural

Tom casual e autêntico, não robotizado

Criar humor no processo de follow-up

Mencionar valor do tempo do prospect (executivos ocupados)

Call-to-action claro no final

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Não especificado

 

ELEMENTOS VISUAIS CHAVE:

Props de escritório dispostos naturalmente

Movimento de procurar itens "perdidos"

Linguagem corporal casual e confiante

Ambiente profissional mas não excessivamente formal

 

DURAÇÃO: ~5 minutos FORMATO: Treinamento prático de vendas com demonstrações ao vivo
